title: [HWToBTOR2] Builds are Flaky
body:
All builds seem to have destabilized after one of the recent changes to HWToBTOR2. The CI windows builds seem to hit this most regularly, though I've experienced it on Linux and macOS.

An example of the failure is in this build log: https://github.com/llvm/circt/actions/runs/11945441683/job/33298106177

Here is a macOS failure:

```
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: Conversion/HWToBTOR2/errors.mlir' FAILED ********************
Exit Code: 134

Command Output (stdout):
--
1 sort bitvec 32
2 constd 1 
--
Command Output (stderr):
--
RUN: at line 1: /Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-opt /Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/test/Conversion/HWToBTOR2/errors.mlir --convert-hw-to-btor2 --verify-diagnostics --split-input-file -o /dev/null
+ /Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-opt /Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/test/Conversion/HWToBTOR2/errors.mlir --convert-hw-to-btor2 --verify-diagnostics --split-input-file -o /dev/null
Assertion failed: (GetNumBytesInBuffer() == 0 && "Current buffer is non-empty!"), function SetBufferAndMode, file raw_ostream.cpp, line 115.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.

 #6 0x0000000199231d20 (/usr/lib/system/libsystem_c.dylib+0x180355d20)
 #7 0x000000010688f680 llvm::raw_ostream::SetBufferSize(unsigned long) (.cold.4) (/Users/schuylereldridge/repos/github.com/llvm/circt/build/bin/circt-opt+0x101c9b680)
```
